a1.verb_hint: Use Will + subject + have + past participle.
Ask about completion before a future time.
After the question word use will + subject + have + V3.
By when asks about a future completion deadline.
Use have + past participle after will.

questions.question: Will you have sent the email by noon? Yes, I {a1}.

a1.verb_hint: Short answers use will, not will have.

variants: Will you have sent the email by noon? Yes, I {a1}.

a1.verb_hint: Do not use has or did in a Future Perfect question.
Keep the subject between will and have.
The tickets should be bought before the future trip.
Ask about the completed amount by a future point.
By what time sets a future completion point.

questions.question: Will she have packed by morning? No, she {a1}.

a1.verb_hint: Use won't for a negative short answer.

variants: Will she have packed by morning? No, she {a1}.
